feedback.text: Dear EU commission, As a citizen of Poland and a consumer i would like you to consider including if not as a whole parts of initiative "Stop killing games" as it increase fairness to consumers in the sector it covers. I would also ask for if possible in the future of enforcement of harsher penalties in relation to breaking consumer laws and or treating customers unfairly, i see time and time again how companies get fined comically small sums of money equivalent to profits not even total turnover, again i would like you to consider a minimum of 15% to 20% of yearly turnover, regardless of profits, there should be consequences. Thank you for your time.
